sections.title: Test Coverage Analysis Report
Executive Summary
sections.content:
- **Total Source Files**: 71 TypeScript source files in `packages/core/src`
- **Test Files Found**: 11 integration tests
- **Tested Modules**: ~15%
- **Critical Gaps**: 85% of modules lack any test coverage

---

sections.title: 1. UNTESTED FUNCTIONS AND CLASSES
**api-server.ts** (897 lines) - NO TESTS
sections.content:
**Critical Untested Functions:**
- `handleRequest()` - Main HTTP request router
- `readBody()` - Request body parser
- `json()` - JSON response handler
- Authentication middleware integration
- SSE streaming endpoints
- Agent management endpoints (GET/POST /agents)
- Terminal endpoints (GET/POST /terminals)
- Health check endpoint

sections.title: **agent-manager.ts** (803 lines) - NO TESTS
sections.content:
**Critical Untested Functions:**
- `spawnInteractive()` - Interactive agent spawning
- `spawnHeadlessAgent()` - Headless agent spawning
- `updateAgentFromHook()` - Hook payload handling
- `checkSystemResources()` - CPU/memory validation
- `listAgents()` - Agent listing/filtering
- `terminateAgent()` - Agent cleanup
- Agent state machine transitions

sections.title: **goap-planner.ts** (319 lines) - NO TESTS
sections.content:
**All Functions Untested:**
- `createPlan()` - Goal-oriented action planning
- `aStarPlan()` - A* pathfinding algorithm
- `parseGoalState()` - Goal keyword parsing
- `statesSatisfied()` - Precondition checking
- `executePlan()` - Plan execution engine
- `registerAction()` - Custom action registration

sections.title: **vector-memory.ts** (263 lines) - NO TESTS
sections.content:
**All Functions Untested:**
- `init()` / `shutdown()` - Lifecycle management
- `store()` - Memory entry storage
- `search()` - Vector similarity search
- `computeEmbedding()` - TF-IDF embeddings
- `cosineSimilarity()` - Similarity calculation
- `rebuildVocabulary()` - Vocabulary maintenance
- `expire()` - TTL-based cleanup

sections.title: **workflow-engine.ts** (~150+ lines) - NO TESTS
sections.content:
**All Functions Untested:**
- `executeWorkflow()` - Workflow execution
- `evaluateCondition()` - Conditional logic
- `interpolatePrompt()` - Template interpolation
- `loadRun()` / `persistRun()` - Persistence
- `listRuns()` - Run history

sections.title: **module-loader.ts** (619 lines) - NO TESTS
sections.content:
**All Functions Untested:**
- `loadModules()` - Dynamic module loading
- `resolveModulePath()` - Path resolution
- `validateModuleStructure()` - Module validation
- Module lifecycle hooks

sections.title: **background-workers.ts** (262 lines) - NO TESTS
sections.content:
**All Functions Untested:**
- Worker spawning and management
- Job queue processing
- Worker health monitoring
- Error recovery mechanisms

sections.title: **task-router.ts** (290 lines) - NO TESTS
sections.content:
**All Functions Untested:**
- Task routing logic
- Priority queue management
- Load balancing
- Task assignment algorithms

---

sections.title: 2. EDGE CASES NOT COVERED
**hivemind-events.ts** (PARTIALLY TESTED)
sections.content:
**Missing Edge Cases:**
- Concurrent writes to ring buffer
- Listener callback exceptions chaining
- Memory leaks from unsubscribed listeners
- Ring buffer wraparound edge conditions
- Duplicate event IDs
- Invalid timestamp handling (negative, future dates)

sections.title: **agent-spawner.ts** (PARTIALLY TESTED)
sections.content:
**Missing Edge Cases:**
- Environment variable injection attacks
- Command injection via profile fields
- Path traversal in `cwd` parameter
- Missing Claude binary handling
- Invalid profile combinations
- Resource exhaustion (spawning too many agents)
- Concurrent spawn operations
- Profile validation bypass attempts

sections.title: **ticket-service.ts** (TESTED but gaps)
sections.content:
**Missing Edge Cases:**
- Concurrent ticket claims (race conditions)
- Circular ticket dependencies (`blockedBy`)
- Sprint capacity overflow
- Audit log tampering
- Comment size limits
- Invalid JSON in persistence layer

---

sections.title: 3. NEW TEST SCENARIOS NEEDED
A. Security & Authentication Tests
B. Concurrency & Race Condition Tests
C. Error Recovery Tests
D. Memory & Resource Tests
4. MISSING ERROR HANDLING TESTS
**api-server.ts**
**agent-spawner.ts**
**goap-planner.ts**
**vector-memory.ts**
5. INTEGRATION TEST GAPS
Missing Integration Tests:
TEST SKELETONS
1. **api-server.test.ts**
2. **agent-manager.test.ts**
3. **goap-planner.test.ts**
4. **vector-memory.test.ts**
5. **workflow-engine.test.ts**
PRIORITY RECOMMENDATIONS
P0 (Critical - Must Fix):
sections.content:
1. **api-server.ts** - Security and authentication gaps
2. **agent-manager.ts** - Resource management and concurrency
3. **agent-spawner.ts** - Command injection vulnerabilities

sections.title: P1 (High - Should Fix Soon):
sections.content:
4. **workflow-engine.ts** - Execution reliability
5. **vector-memory.ts** - Data integrity
6. **goap-planner.ts** - Planning correctness

sections.title: P2 (Medium - Nice to Have):
sections.content:
7. **task-router.ts** - Routing logic
8. **background-workers.ts** - Worker reliability
9. **module-loader.ts** - Dynamic loading safety

sections.title: Test Infrastructure Improvements:
sections.content:
- Add test fixtures for common scenarios
- Implement mock factories for agents, profiles, tickets
- Add integration test harness for E2E scenarios
- Set up CI/CD coverage reporting
- Add performance benchmarking suite

---

**Coverage Goal**: Increase from ~15% to 80%+ coverage within next sprint.

rawOutputPreview:
Based on my comprehensive analysis of the codebase, I've identified significant test coverage gaps across multiple modules. Here's my detailed analysis:

## Test Coverage Analysis Report

### Executive Summary
- **Total Source Files**: 71 TypeScript source files in `packages/core/src`
- **Test Files Found**: 11 integration tests
- **Tested Modules**: ~15%
- **Critical Gaps**: 85% of modules lack any test coverage

---

## 1. UNTESTED FUNCTIONS AND CLASSES

### **api-server.ts** (897 lines) - NO TESTS
**Critical Untested Functions:**
- `handleRequest()` - Main HTTP request router
- `readBody()` - Request body parser
- `json()` - JSON response handler
- Authentication middleware integration
- SSE streaming endpoints
- Agent management endpoints (GET/POST /agents)
- Terminal endpoints (GET/POST /terminals)
- Health check endpoint

### **agent-manager.ts** (803 lines) - NO TESTS
**Critical Untested Functions:**
- `spawnInteractive()` - Interactive agent spawning
- `spawnHeadlessAgent()` - Headless agent spawning
- `updateAgentFromHook()` - Hook payload handling
- `checkSystemResources()` - CPU/memory validation
- `listAgents()` - Agent listing/filtering
- `terminateAgent()` - Agent cleanup
- Agent state machine transitions

### **goap-planner.ts** (319 lines) - NO TESTS
**All Functions Untested:**
- `createPlan()` - Goal-oriented action planning
- `aStarPlan()` - A* pathfinding algorithm
- `parseGoalState()` - Goal keyword parsing
- `statesSatisfied()` - Precondition checking
- `executePlan()` - Plan execution engine
- `registerAction()` - Custom action registration

### **vector-memory.ts** (263 lines) - NO TESTS
**All Functions Untested:**
- `init()` / `shutdown()` - Lifecycle management
- `store()` - Memory entry storage
- `search()` - Vector similarity search
- `computeEmbedding()` - TF-IDF embeddings
- `cosineSimilarity()` - Similarity calculation
- `rebuildVocabulary()` - Vocabulary maintenance
- `expire()` - TTL-based cleanup

### **workflow-engine.ts** (~150+ li
